requirement_topic.en: Market Access Gatekeeper — in-country importer, PECAE inspection, and port handling
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入要点——本地进口商、PECAE检验与港口办理
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入要點——本地進口商、PECAE檢驗與港口辦理

summary.en: Cameroon market entry for regulated lithium batteries and power banks is importer-led. A local in-country importer is needed to manage customs filing, compliance annexes, and inspection coordination. In practice, import flow is handled through controlled channels such as Douala and Kribi, with supporting documents aligned to ANOR/NC conformity expectations and any PECAE-style controls for the declared tariff and risk class.
summary.zh: 对喀麦隆受监管的锂电池和移动电源，市场准入以本地进口商主导。必须有境内进口商负责通关、合规附件和检验协调。实际操作中，货物通常通过喀麦隆主要港口如杜阿拉和克里比处理，所需文件需与ANOR/NC合规和PECAE式控制一致。
summary.zht: 對喀麥隆受監管的鋰電池與行動電源，市場准入以本地進口商為主導。必須有境內進口商負責通關、合規附件及檢驗協調。實務操作中，貨物通常由杜阿拉及克里比等港口處理，所需文件需與ANOR/NC合規及PECAE式控制保持一致。

standards_or_laws: ANOR/NC import conformity administration for regulated electrical imports
Cameroon customs handling framework at Douala and Kribi for inspected product categories
PECAE-linked pre-check and inspection process where scoped for in-country products

summary.en: China has exporter-driven customs export and domestic certification models (for example CCC and GB-based documentation), but these do not substitute for Cameroon importer-led import control. There is no direct one-to-one importer equivalence in Chinese domestic regulations.
summary.zh: 中国是出口商/供应商主导报关并依托国内认证路径（如CCC和GB类文件），但不能替代喀麦隆由本地进口商主导的进口监管。中国国内制度与喀麦隆进口方路径不具有直接一一对应关系。
summary.zht: 中國是出口商/供應商主導報關並依托國內認證路徑（如CCC和GB類文件），但不能替代喀麥隆由本地進口商主導的進口監管。中國國內制度與喀麥隆進口方路徑不具有直接一對一對應關係。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 and other GB/T safety documents in the China supply chain
CCC regime under Chinese administration for covered categories

gap.en: The gap is process architecture. Cameroon does not permit a direct China-side filing model for regulated imports. Exporters must coordinate with a local importer and follow Cameroonian port/customs workflows and in-scope inspection demands. This is separate from technical testing differences and is frequently the actual blocker for first-time consignments.
gap.zh: 差距在于流程架构。喀麦隆对受监管进口不允许以中国端提交方式直接对接。出口商必须与在地进口商协作，按喀麦隆港口/海关流程及范围内检验要求进行。该要求独立于技术测试差异之外，也是首批发运常见阻断点。
gap.zht: 差距在於流程架構。喀麥隆對受監管進口不允許以中國端提交方式直接對接。出口商必須與在地進口商協作，按喀麥隆港口/海關流程及範圍內檢驗要求進行。該要求獨立於技術測試差異之外，也是首批發運常見阻斷點。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for regulated import cases: in-country importer-led customs route and inspection coordination before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as direct legal equivalent; Chinese domestic importer model and export docs are separate

source.publisher: Cameroon customs and trade administration channels

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for Cameroon should be designed around an in-country importer and port-based customs workflow (notably Douala and Kribi), not around China-only certificate transfer. Plan importer engagement and French-facing import annexes before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆市场准入应围绕在地进口商和港口通关流程（尤其是杜阿拉、克里比）设计，而不是依赖中国端证书直接转换。请在出货前完成进口商对接并备齐法语进口文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆市場准入應圍繞本地進口商及港口通關流程（尤其是杜阿拉、克里比）設計，而非依賴中國端證書直接轉換。請在出貨前完成進口商對接並備齊法語進口文件。
